mission.title: ollama: added tools when `stream=true`

steps.title: Understand the problem
steps.description:
```
curl --location '127.0.0.1:11434/v1/chat/completions' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
  "messages": [
    {
      "content": "You are a helpful AI assistant that can use to

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
curl --location '127.0.0.1:11434/v1/chat/completions' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data '{
  "messages": [
    {
      "content": "You are a helpful AI assistant that can use tools.",
      "role": "system"
    },
    {
      "content": "What is function_1(10, 11)? use provided tools",
      "role": "user"
    }
  ],
  "model": "llama3-groq-tool-use:8b",
  "logprobs": false,
  "n": 1,
  "stream": true,
  "temperature": 0,
  "tools": [
    {
      "type": "f
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/lobehub/lobehub/pull/3327. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary: #### 💻 变更类型 | Change Type #### 🔀 变更说明 | Description of Change - support ollama tools use, close #3436 #### 📝 补充信息 | Additional Information https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/5915

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with ollama installed or the issue environment reproducible.
